title: Escape the festive rush at Misty Valley Farm & Harmony Distillery
description: BUSINESS NEWS AND VIDEO - The festive season...
bodyText:
Advertorial
                            Video

BUSINESS NEWS AND VIDEO - The festive season along the Garden Route is a vibrant, bustling time - but it doesn't have to be overwhelming.


> Just 6km outside Hartenbos, Misty Valley Farm and the Harmony Distillery offer the perfect blend of relaxation, great food, family fun and slow countryside living.


With ample, easy-access parking and a peaceful setting away from the holiday chaos, it's an ideal destination for locals and visitors alike.

Misty Valley Farm has become a favourite staycation stop for families looking to enjoy quality moments together.

From hearty farm-style breakfasts to wood-fired pizzas, fresh bakes and deli favourites, there's something to satisfy every taste. Prepared meals are also available for those lazy holiday days when cooking feels like a chore.

Parents can unwind while kids play freely - thanks to the spacious indoor and outdoor play areas, complete with supervision, ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience for the little ones.


> On the same farm, the Harmony Distillery invites guests to slow down and savour the moment.


Their premium gin tastings are perfect for those wanting to explore award-winning, locally crafted flavours. With rolling farm views and a relaxed atmosphere, it's a refreshing escape from the busy festive crowds.

Whether you're planning a family outing, a quiet meal, a festive meet-up with friends or an afternoon gin tasting, the farm offers something for everyone. This holiday season, make Misty Valley Farm and Harmony Distillery part of your must-visit list - where good food, open spaces and memorable moments come naturally.


## Contact details:


- 066 470 4518
- Misty Valley Farm Facebook
- Harmony Distillery Facebook
- Website


> VIDEO - Escape the rush at Misty Valley Farm & Harmony Distillery:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
